reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Leather - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely the best campus , great faculty and staff

review_content.Placements: The top roles offered were senior designers, senior design consultants. The placements in the last couple of years have been almost around 96%, and the average package offered was around 5-6 Lakhs per annum. Top recruiting companies were Puma, Adidas, Yoho, and a few other companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There?s full time wifi available for digital purposes. Footwear Labs has the best machines. The machines are brought from Italy and are maintained. The hostel is pretty good. The food is simple and suits all kinds of people, like North/South. We have a nice ground and a temple as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty but hoping for better placements.

review_content.Placements: 40% of students were placed in my course. The highest package is unknown but the average pay is 15–16k for freshers. Top recruiting companies include retail conglomerates like Aditya Birla, Reliance, and a few renowned boutiques in the city. 60% of students got internship from my course in companies like Da Milano, Ritu Kumar of reliance, Uniqlo, etc. Most of the students went for off-campus since there were more opportunities. Since I'm in department of fashion design, the roles offered were in retail brands and few off-campus roles like fashion stylists, assistant designers, merchandising, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Footwear - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty members along with neat hostel rooms, mess and canteen are provided by the college.

review_content.Placements: Average package of the recent placements was around 7.5 Lacs. You can get placed as a retailer or a designer. The students having above 8 and 9 CGPA get to sit in the placements first. If you are confident enough then obviously you will get selected.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is really good. The faculty members here are very friendly, they will help you out with everything. The hostel rooms and mess are also good. Infrastructure is also good here having separate buildings for each course. There's a lawn along with a sports complex for you to play.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I would not recommend this college.

review_content.Placements: Placements at this college are not good. For our seniors in the fashion design department, they were providing placements mostly in the retail sector. Only 3–4 seniors got placed in a design house. The highest salary package offered was 4.5 LPA, and the lowest was 1.5 LPA. Most people need to find jobs by themselves.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are also good and spacious. A library is also available, but it is not always open during college hours. Hostel rooms are good, spacious, and three-seaters. There are two girls' hostels. There is no canteen. For small things, we have to go outside. Mess food is manageable. The condition of washrooms is pretty bad. They clean the rooms once a week only.

admission_overview.college_name: Footwear Design and Development Institute, Hyderabad Course Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection

paragraphs: Footwear Design & Development Institute, Hyderabad admission 2025is currently open. The college offers courses, such as BBA, BDes, MDes and MBA at the UG and PG level. To get admission to theFootwear Design & Development Institute, Hyderabad, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college offers four courses in streams such as Business & Managemnet Studies and Design. The application process at Footwear Design & Development Institute, Hyderabad is conducted online. Read the following article to know more about theFDDI, Hyderabad course admission2025.

Footwear Design & Development Institute, Hyderabad admission 2025is entrance-based. The college conducts an aptitude test called FDDI AIST (in-house entrance exam) for admission to UG and PG courses. Check out the following table forFootwear Design & Development Institute, Hyderabadadmission highlights2025:
Particulars
FDDI, Hyderabad Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered

The institute offers admission to courses based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must first fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for the entrance test conducted by the institute. The basic eligibility to apply for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forFootwear Design & Development Institute, Hyderabad courses:
*The age limit for the Bachelor’s programme shall be 25 years as of 1 July 2024.

Footwear Design & Development Institute, Hyderabad admission process includes registration and candidates have to sit and appear for an entrance exam called FDDI AIST. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in Footwear Design & Development Institute, Hyderabad:
STEP 1: FDDI, Hyderabad Application Process 2025
Fill out the application form on the official website of Footwear Design and Development Institute, Hyderabad, and pay the application fee given below:
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on FDDI AIST entrance exam scores. The Institute conducts an entrance exam forBBA, BDes, MDes and MBA courses which is FDDI AIST.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay theFDDI, Hyderabad feeat the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for the FDDI Hyderabad BDes?
faqs.answer: The selection criteria for the BDes programme at FDDI Hyderabad are academic merit, primarily assessed on the basis of FDDI AIST performance. Based on AIST scores, a merit list is prepared, and only deserving candidates are shortlisted for admission.

faqs.answer: Yes, MBA course is available at Footwear Design and Development Institute. FDDI, Hyderabad offers a two-year MA course divided into four semesters. Interested students are advised to stay updated with the upcoming dates by frequently visiting the institute's official website. Therefore, the institute has not released any specified admission deadline.

highlights.summary: Vijaybhoomi School of Design, Vijaybhoomi University admission 2025 is open.

college_info.intro:
The Vijaybhoomi School of Design's popular programme is Bachelor of Design (BDes) and can accommodate 60 students. The college offers degree courses in full-time mode across various specialisations such as Communication Design, UX/UI Design, Branding, Graphic Design, and Fashion Communication. The Vijaybhoomi School of Design, Vijaybhoomi University programmes are designed in a manner to nurture students’ mindsets and to make them industry-ready.
The UG-level programme offered at the institute has a programme architecture that includes 5 types, i.e., Foundation, Core, Track, General Education, and Practice. Vijaybhoomi School of Design Mumbai BDes programme has a duration of 4 years and hence, provides students with an opportunity to earn 160 credits per year for 4 years to complete. Each specialization offered at the institute has its own importance and set of criteria to follow. For instance, the Communication Design programme helps students to explore the art of visual storytelling and the shift from old technical methods to new digital platforms. Further, the Graphic Design programme helps students to learn the principles of graphic communication and to use them in their daily lives.

admission_process.title: Vijaybhoomi School of Design, Vijaybhoomi University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Vijaybhoomi School of Design admission 2025 is based on the entrance exam.VSDoffers BDes courses at the UG level. The BDes course at the UG level. However, the BDes courses are offered in four specialisations, i.e.,Communication Design, UX Design, Graphic Design and Fashion Communication. Candidates looking for admission should have to appear for a university-based entrance exam called VUSAT forVijaybhoomi School of Design course admissions.

VSD, Vijaybhoomi University admissions are based on entrance exams. The eligibility criteria for this course is Class 12 with a 50% aggregate. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forVijaybhoomi School of Design courses:
Read More:Vijaybhoomi University Brochure

VSD admission process includes online application submission, application scrutiny by the admission committee and the VUSAT aptitude test for admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat at Vijaybhoomi School of Design:
STEP 1: VSD Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the college, i.e., https://admissions.vijaybhoomi.edu.in/application-form. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 500 to complete the application procedure.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Vijaybhoomi School of Design shortlists candidates based on a university-level entrance exam called VUSAT. The college will display a provisional merit list after concluding the admission interview. After clearing all the above-mentioned rounds, candidates will receive an admission letter.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theVijaybhoomi School of Design feeto confirm their seats in the university.

individual_reviews.title: Our college provides a good and better career.

content.Placements: About 80% of the students from our course got placed. The salary offered here ranges from Rs. 20,000 to 25,000 per month. The information regarding the top recruiting companies of our course is not disclosed. The top role offered in our course is web development. The salary package offered in our course is 2.5 LPA. About 70% of the students got internships in local shops, and some students got in Vistaprint, Red Chillies Star, News Jabong, Zapak and other local companies. Local shops like Dharma Productions are available to practice and do internships.

college_info.college_name: INIFD Panvel - International Institute of Fashion Design, Panvel

highlights.summary:
Admissions 2023 are open to all the courses. Candidates can check and apply through the official website.

Inter National Institute of Fashion Designing (INIFD) Panvel is one of the finest Fashion Designing institutes in India. INIFD is the only Institution in India where students get the opportunity to showcase their talent at esteemed events like London Fashion Week, New York Fashion Week, Femina Miss India and Lakme Fashion Week.

The curriculum at INIFD is designed in association with the London School of Trends (LST) and the British Accreditation Council (BAC). In addition to theoretical learning, students at INIFD get to experience real-life situations pertaining to design. Experts from the industry are invited to the institute to share their experience and guide the aspiring designers. INIFD provides mentorship by internationally-acclaimed designers such as Paul Chambers, Joseph Toronka, Sarah Manning, April Glassbrow and many more.

A portfolio is an integral part for any designer and at INIFD, students are helped by the faculty for creation of the same, hence increasing their employability. The institute has industry collaborations with top brands such as Duravit, Ecorex and The S & C Co. UK, to give hands-on experience about the subject.

In addition to the basic facilities, INIFD has a well-built campus and has interior designing labs, fashion design labs and a display area, computer labs and activity rooms to ensure a comfortable experience for all students.

INIFD Panvel admission is done on the basis of merit obtained by students in the qualifying exam. There is no entrance test for admission at INIFD and students can directly apply for admission to the desired course.

Read more: INIFD Panvel Admission Process

INIFD Panvel offers multiple courses in Fashion Designing and Interior Designing. The foundation course and the advanced course is offered in affiliation with Annamalai University.

INIFD Panvel has an active placement cell that organises campus placement drives every year. Students get to work with the leading brands of the fashion and interior designing industry. INIFD has partnerships with many leading names mentioned below:

Read more: INIFD Panvel Placements

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Media Graphics and Animation - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college for animation courses.

content.Placements: The placement team was very professional from the very start of the placement process. They help students to gain in-depth knowledge about the company before exams. The average salary package offered was 4.25 LPA.
content.Faculty: Teachers were very helpful. The course curriculum did not make students ready for the industry. The passing percentage was average. Semester exams were not difficult. If we studied properly, we would score good marks.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Media Graphics and Animation - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It's above average college.

content.Placements: At least 60-70% required for getting a decent placement. An animator is the most common roles offered after job. But there are many students who are placed as a graphic designer or video editor. It depends on the students which line should one individual choose.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well and the course should be changed from my opinion, Wi-Fi is below average classroom good but labs not good. Everything is good as any other college provides. Courses should be more up-to-date which is required to have industry ready.

content.Infrastructure: Classrooms here are very good, very neat and clean. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Our labs had Wi-Fi also, and every student had a separate PC. I am happy with this college. If you want a good degree in animation, then this college is very best in Lucknow.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Media Graphics and Animation - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am extremely disappointed with my experience.

content.Placements: I've seen many seniors not getting placements because of the reason that they're students from Lucknow's branch. I don't think it's worth money if you are taking admission here and completing your graduation from such a college.
content.Infrastructure: There are just 4-5 rooms in our college and not more than that. There's a room for the FY batch, SY batch, and TY batch. Other than that, there's a Diploma room, a chroma lab, and an office for the HOD and staff. Washrooms are never clean, smelly, or dirty.

admission_process.title: Hues and Styles Institute of Design and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Hues & Styles Institute of Design & Managementadmission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers courses such as BVoc, BDes and Diploma. The selection criteria for every course are based on CUET entrance exam scores. To get admitted to HSIDM, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process atHues & Styles Institute of Design & Managementis conducted online. Read the article to know more about theHues & Styles Institute of Design & Managementcourse admission2025.

HSIDM course admissionis completely entrance exam-based, i.e., CUET. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the college must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Candidates looking for course admission must complete Class 12. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of theHues and Styles Institute of Design and Management courses:

Hues and Styles Institute of Design and Management admissionsare completely based on the national-level entrance exam score called CUET. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Hues and Styles Institute of Design and Management is as follows:
STEP 1: Hues and Styles Institute of Design and Management Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://www.huesandstyles.net/admission-form/. Candidates have to fill up all the details carefully, such as name, mobile number, highest qualification, etc. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
The institute admits students based on CUET entrance exam scores. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theHues and Styles Institute of Design and Management feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms had separate cots, shelves, etc. Corridors were maintained neat and clean. Mess food was good and hygienic. The canteen served a variety of snacks and food items. Ground facilities were comfortable for playing games. They provided medical facilities.
review_content.Faculty: Professors were friendly. They explained our doubts kindly and understandably. They helped students score good marks in model exams and semester exams. In our batch, the pass percentage was 85%. Teachers were very talented in guiding students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I would highly recommend students to join this college.

review_content.Placements: Placements were good. The average salary package offered was 2 LPA. The minimum salary package offered was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Capgemini, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, TCS, VRCM, etc. Separate placement classes were available for students by this college authorities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Laboratory, computer, and library facilities were available. I would recommend students gain in-depth knowledge with the help of faculty members.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were friendly and well-educated. You could ask for any academic help from them. They also provided practical knowledge to students. The course curriculum makes students ready for the industry. The teaching quality was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the whole college.

review_content.Placements: The campus placement arrangements are incredible. The top companies like TCS, Infosys, and HCL are available for campus interviews. review_summary.college_name: Shri Sakthikailassh Women's College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best college in the Salem district, which is very safe and secure for women.

content.Placements: Our college has the best placement. We are currently attending drives from top companies. Also, we had an excellent placement coaching. They give additional coaching for our placements. This is very helpful for us to be placed in a good and reputable company.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has more labs, Wi-Fi facilities, sports center, libraries, and a clean and neat canteen. The college environment is pleasant and clean, which gives us space. It has a smart class like a projector class and more than three seminar halls.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in English - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The best part of my life is college life.

content.Placements: The course I chose is B.A. English. The requirements are above 50% of marks must scored in the 12th public examination. The academics are easy and prepare me well for real-life challenges. Placements are great in Shri Sakthikailassh College. Students are placed in top companies like Infosys, Techno, Wipro, InfoTech, etc. It provides a great opportunity for every student to work in a top company.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good. The library, sports ground, labs, and separate blocks for every department are there. The gym and extracurricular activity rooms are also available. My college has a huge transport facility. My college has a hostel facility. The food is very hygienic. The hostel fees are nearly Rs. 5,000 per year. Hostel timing is 7:00 AM to 9:00 PM.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is a good educational institution.

content.Placements: Students with a minimum of 60% of marks were placed. TCS and other IT companies offered placements. In our batch, many students got placements. Our college conducted training classes for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms had separate cots, shelves, etc. Corridors were maintained neat and clean. Mess food was good and hygienic. The canteen served a variety of snacks and food items. Ground facilities were comfortable for playing games. They provided medical facilities.
content.Faculty: Professors were friendly. They explained our doubts kindly and understandably. They helped students score good marks in model exams and semester exams. In our batch, the pass percentage was 85%. Teachers were very talented in guiding students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I would highly recommend students to join this college.

content.Placements: Placements were good. The average salary package offered was 2 LPA. The minimum salary package offered was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Capgemini, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, TCS, VRCM, etc. Separate placement classes were available for students by this college authorities.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratory, computer, and library facilities were available. I would recommend students gain in-depth knowledge with the help of faculty members.
content.Faculty: Teachers were friendly and well-educated. You could ask for any academic help from them. They also provided practical knowledge to students. The course curriculum makes students ready for the industry. The teaching quality was good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the whole college.

content.Placements: The campus placement arrangements are incredible. The top companies like TCS, Infosys, and HCL are available for campus interviews. The coaching provided by the staff and placement coordinators for clearing the interviews is appreciable. Aptitude and communication were taught.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of the food is okay, and the hospitality in the hostel is very nice. The fee structure of the hostel is too affordable. The permission to take leave was granted only in hard times like illness, sickness, or any other medical issues. On leave days, we can move to our home town.

highlights.summary:
The TG LAWCET 2026 registration process is open for Vijetha Academy admission to 3-year LLB and 5-year Integrated LLB courses; the last date to register without a late fee is Apr 1, 2026. Further, the TG LAWCET 2026 exam will be conducted on May 18, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Vijetha Academy offers several UG and PG programmes in the stream of Science, Law, Arts, Pharmacy, and Management. The BBA programme is one of the most popular programmes offered at the college. It is offered for a duration of three years. The programme focuses on various subjects such as Accounts & Finance, Sales & Marketing, Operations & SCM, and Systems & Strategy, among others. The BBA graduates have a lot of career opportunities in various areas including Marketing Manager, Sales Manager, Human Resources Manager, Financial Analyst, and Operations Manager. among others.
The college provides distance education and online degree programmes with a wide range of subjects and specialisations in BA, BCom, and BSc., BBM, BSC, BHMT, MA, MCOM, MSC, MCA, Executive MBA, MBA, and PhD. paragraphs: Vijetha Academy's admission process includes registration and application form evaluation. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat in VA:

Candidates are required to apply offline. The filled application has to be submitted in person, in which the candidate seeks admission along with the necessary academic documents for spot admission. Students can also check the detailedVijetha Academy feestructure here.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for Vijetha Academy?
faqs.answer: Vijetha Academy admissions are based on both entrance-exam or merit as per course requirement. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Once selected, candidates must pay the programme fee to confirm their seats in the institute.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Vijetha Academy?
faqs.answer: Yes, for getting admission in Vijetha Academy, the candidate should register themselves for the consideration. The eligibility for the admission is class 12 with 45% and graduation with 50% aggregate, selection will be completely merit-based. The duration for UG is three years and for PG its two years. Candidates can apply through online and offline mode for application process. For online process candidates can visit official website of college to register themselves through admission portal, and fill out the required details correctly with attached documents. For offline mode the candidate can collect the admission form and prospectus from the college by paying the application fee, which is non refundable.

faqs.question: How difficult is it to get into Vijetha Academy for BBA?
faqs.answer: Vijetha Academy admission to theBBA courseis bothonline and offline. Candidates willing to get admission must have valid scores in entrance exams. The basic eligibility criteria is Class 12 with aminimum of 45%-50%. aggregate. The accepted entrance exams are TS CUET, and others. Hardworking students have easily secured admission in this college.

A total of 140 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 2 year PG degree at Guru Nanak College For Girls and 110 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 110 students 34 were placed with median salary of INR 180000 and 18 students opted for higher studies. A total of 395 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 3 year UG degree at Guru Nanak College For Girls and 305 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 305 students 8 were placed with median salary of INR 144000 and 122 students opted for higher studies. For the batch ending 2020-21, the placement record for 2 year PG course at Guru Nanak College For Girls was 4.2%.The median package offered for the students during this session was INR 180000 Lakh. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Over College University of Technology is the best college and University.

content.Placements: Students from the course were placed in the latest placement drive. Top Recruiting Companies were TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Amazon, Deloitte, IBM, etc.

A central library with a large collection of textbooks, reference books, and journals online/offline. Hostels have adequate facilities with shared/separate rooms depending on the type. Basic amenities like study tables, fans, and cupboards were provided. Regular cleaning and maintenance, though comfort may vary depending on occupancy. The mess provides a fixed menu with nutritious meals. On Campus Health facilities were available. Facilities for indoor and outdoor games, such as cricket.

admission_overview.college_name: University of Technology Jaipur Admission 2025: Fee, Application, Eligibility & Selection

admission_process.title: University of Technology Jaipur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: University of Technology Jaipur admissionis both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, GATE, etc. for admission to specific courses. UOT offers over 60 UG, PG, and doctoral courses through six schools/ departments. Apart from the degree courses,UOT Jaipuralso offers several diploma courses. The mode of application at the university is online or offline for all courses.

University of Technology offers courses in multiple streams such as Management, Law, Science, Arts etc. The university offers courses in full-time offline mode. Aspirants can fill out the form online or download the same to apply for the preferred course. Candidates can check below the keyUOT admissionhighlights:
Particulars
UOT Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
How to apply?
https://www.universityoftechnology.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Admission to the UOT programmes is both merit and entrance-based. Candidates need to meet the eligibility requirements specified for their preferred course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility and selection criteria for the topUOT Jaipur courses:
Note:In the absence of information, I have taken the selection criteria from unofficial sources. Hence, data might vary.

University of Technology Jaipur admission criteriamay vary from course to course. Aspirants should check the course-specific eligibility requirements before filling out the application form. Admission to the offered courses is based on qualifying exam or entrance exam scores. Each of the stages of the admission process is explained below:
STEP 1: UOT Jaipur Application Process 2025

The eligible students can visit the official website (https://www.universityoftechnology.edu.in/) to register and fill out the admission form. Aspirants are required to pay an application fee to register for a course at UOT.
STEP 2: Shortlisting of Students

After the conclusion of the application process, candidates are shortlisted either based on merit in the last qualifying examination or the accepted entrance exam. For Professional/ Technical Courses, aspirants need to pass an entrance test and would be selected for the course only if they fulfil the merit requirements.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the candidates are informed about their selection, they need to come for document verification. Selected candidates can further visit the university campus to pay theUOT Jaipur fee.

reviews.review_heading: Over College University of Technology is the best college and University.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has spacious, well ventilated Laboratories. High speed Wi-Fi was available. The mess provides a fixed menu with nutritious meals. On Campus Health facil...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the education and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities available for B.Com students, like well-maintained libraries, well-maintained classrooms, etc. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good quality. Also, we have good medical facilities for B.Com students.

reviews.review_heading: UOT Jaipur offers a spacious campus with supportive faculty and decent facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and well-equipped laboratories. There are large grounds and sports complexes for the students to play sports like cricket, football, and basketball. Students here have access to AC and non-AC rooms to choose from.

reviews.review_heading: My university campus tour.
reviews.review_text: The university offers good campus facilities, and there are well-educated and experienced teachers according to the course. There is also hostel accommodation available with good quality food in the mess and canteen, along with other necessary facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our campus environment was very good. All facilities like Wi-Fi, the laboratory, and RO were available. The food served in the mess was good. Attached washrooms were available in the hostel. All facilities were available at our college. Warden was very good. All sports equipment was available. Basketball and football courts were available. A cricket ground was also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our university is established in the year 2017.
reviews.review_text: Our institution provides all the facilities like Wi-Fi, a lab, good classrooms and a library. Everything is good here.

college_info.college_name: J.D.Women's College (JDWC): Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The MAT 2026 exam result for admission to the MBA course for the CBT and the PBT modes will be announced soon.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: J.D.Women's College (JDWC) was founded in 1971. It is a private institute and is located in Patna, Bihar. J.D.Women's College (JDWC) courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and Certificate levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and offers courses in Full Time mode. J.D.Women's College (JDWC) offers a total of 39 courses in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Design, Mass Communication & Media and Humanities & Social Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., MCA, BCA and B.A. and the total seat intake for the available courses is 3819. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Chemistry, Mathematics, Physics, Sales & Marketing and Sanskrit. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 15,000 to 9,80,000 and the average median salary is around INR 3,33,333. Apart from this, the J.D.Women's College (JDWC) campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied.

review_content.Placements: 50% of students got placed in the course. The requirement to appear in the placement cell is 70%. Almost all students take part in the placement cell, but there are very few placement opportunities in this. 50% of the students got placed in the course. The requirement to appear in the placement cell is 70%. Almost all students take part in the placement cell, but there are very few placement opportunities in this department. Only 2-3 students get that opportunity.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is almost fine. Classrooms are quite good. The computer lab is also impressive but the problem with it is that if you are 1st and 2nd year student, you will not be able to use it softly because the lab is used as a classroom by final-year students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Physics - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Very good infrastructure and every facility you need at this college. I would recommend it.

review_content.Placements: Placement cell is not available for B.Sc. in our college. However, if you pursue BBA, MBA, or any vocational course, you can access the placement cell. The minimum package amount is 2 Lacs, and the maximum is 10 Lacs. About 35% of students got placed through the college placement. It is average.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our college. It has a proper department for every subject and well-maintained infrastructure. Proper labs, Wi-Fi, hostels, playgrounds, and a gym are all available here. You also have access to the library and canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. (Hons.) in Psychology - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: A good college in a low budget.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement facility. This is only a simple course that you can pursue. But teachers are supportive. They motivate students and give information regarding the future career and scope of the subject. Overall, it was an average experience there.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and buildings are very good. A Wi-Fi facility is available. But there is no permission to use phones on campus. You can only receive calls in the zero zone. There are also provisions for a fine of 500 for using phones. But these things are applicable on any random day. These are the only rules. The hostel facility was also good. Sometimes they make good food, on average. 4 girls live in one room. There is a facility for washing machines for students living there. Overall, the hostel is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good college and campus life.

review_content.Placements: As I am a first-year student, I don't know much better, but as far as I know, the last placement was done in 2016, and that too for the Masters degree, and yes, the package is very low, and there is no placement for the graduation degree. There are no internships and very few internal placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The BCA department is the most clean, well maintained and disciplined department. There is Wi-Fi, library computer labs, a smart TV, projectors and AC in each class. Well-maintained washrooms are there. The hostel is also okay and the food is average. The total capacity of the hostel is 54–56.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Management(BBM) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: College offers best faculty and facilities to the students.

review_content.Placements: Our college gives enough placements to its students. At the college, around 40% of students were successful on campus placements. The average package offered at our college was 3–8 LPA. The top recruiting companies in our college were Fusion, ICICI, Process, etc. The top roles offered were HR, relationship manager, executive, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure for our course was good. The college has good-quality facilities on campus. The college has Wi-Fi, a canteen, a hostel, labs, a library, etc. on its campus. Hostel rooms were neat and clean. Hostel mess was making food with proper hygiene and the food was tasty.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Physics - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: In my views it is good environment of college is nice.

review_content.Placements: I have no idea about this placement sector, but there is no current placement in my course so I can say that my college does not offer placement for any of the courses. Some times you can get offers in future but currently I can tell you this is only for studies not placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: It's good . You can get almost every facility. Hostel facility is available ,guards are there to look after students. Library is there to spend time with books you can get library card easily. NCC is conducted in our college students goes to play at national level.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is almost fine. Classrooms are quite good. The computer lab is also impressive but the problem with it is that if you are 1st and 2nd year student, you will not be able to use it softly because the lab is used as a classroom by final-year students.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and every facility you need at this college. I would recommend it.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in our college. It has a proper department for every subject and well-maintained infrastructure. Proper labs, Wi-Fi, hostels, playgrounds, and a gym are all available here. You also have access to the library and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: A good college in a low budget.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and buildings are very good. A Wi-Fi facility is available. But there is no permission to use phones on campus. You can only receive calls in the zero zone. There are also provisions for a fine of 500 for using phones. But these things are applicable on any random day. These are the only rules. The hostel facility was also good. Sometimes they make good food, on average. 4 girls live in one room. There is a facility for washing machines for students living there. Overall, the ...

reviews.review_heading: Good college and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The BCA department is the most clean, well maintained and disciplined department. There is Wi-Fi, library computer labs, a smart TV, projectors and AC in each class. Well-maintained washrooms are there. The hostel is also okay and the food is average. The total capacity of the hostel is 54–56.

reviews.review_heading: College offers best faculty and facilities to the students.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure for our course was good. The college has good-quality facilities on campus. The college has Wi-Fi, a canteen, a hostel, labs, a library, etc. on its campus. Hostel rooms were neat and clean. Hostel mess was making food with proper hygiene and the food was tasty.

reviews.review_heading: In my views it is good environment of college is nice.
reviews.review_text:
It's good .
You can get almost every facility.
Hostel facility is available ,guards are there to look after students. Library is there to spend time with books you can get library card easily. NCC is conducted in our college students goes to play at national level.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best government college for girls.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college is a constituent of Patliputra University Patna. It is a government college, but it works like a private college. All courses have different departments and buildings. Labs and classrooms are good. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JD women's college (Bihar).
reviews.review_text: Infrastructures of college is very good. It includes a very good ground, library, science lab, technical lab, and other things as well. There is also a canteen available in our college which provides quality food at good rates. Medical room is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Great college for girls and the environment is also good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my college are good like classrooms have ACs, cctv cameras are there in the whole department, computer labs are also amazing and all the computer systems work well. Library is also good and they have lots of books there. There is a Wi-Fi connectivity too.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to take admission.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good with good and safe rooms. Food served is good. Air-conditioners are not available. There are two canteens on campus. Our college has a big auditorium for events. Our campus is large.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for girls.
reviews.review_text: Our college is for women, which allow students to pursue courses like BA, B.Sc and BCA in various subjects like physics, chemistry, maths, English, Hindi, botany, economics, etc. The college has a huge campus with spacious classrooms and a library.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for women to study.
reviews.review_text: The college has a huge campus. There are different buildings for different courses. The classrooms were spacious and the labs were well-equipped with the latest instruments needed for the studies. There were big basketball courts as well as for other games.

reviews.review_heading: The college is just good if you want a degree only.
reviews.review_text: There is good facility and infrastructure available for our course. It has a good lab and smart board, as well as a well-maintained library. The college hostel is very good; it has a nice mess, and the canteen is very good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also available.

college_info.college_name: International School of Design, Pimpri-Chinchwad: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: International School of Design, Pimpri-Chinchwad is a private institute and is located in Pune, Maharashtra. International School of Design, Pimpri-Chinchwad courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and Certificate levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. International School of Design, Pimpri-Chinchwad offers a total of 62 courses in streams such as Business & Management Studies, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design and Animation. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., B.Des and M.Des. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Digital Marketing, Fashion Design, Graphic Design, Jewellery Design and Textile Design. Further, the fee for all these courses is INR 2,60,720. Apart from this, the International School of Design, Pimpri-Chinchwad campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

college_info.college_name: Indira Kala Sangit Vishwavidyalaya - IKSVV: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Established in 1956, Indira Kala Sangit Vishwavidyalaya - IKSVV is located in Chhattisgarh. The institute offers courses like MBA/PGDM, B.A., After 10th Diploma, BFA and UG Diploma. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 48 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Humanities & Social Sciences, Hospitality & Travel and Beauty & Fitness. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

placements.overview: Established in 1956, Indira Kala Sangit Vishwavidyalaya - IKSVV is located in Chhattisgarh. The institute offers courses like MBA/PGDM, B.A., After 10th Diploma, BFA and UG Diploma. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 48 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Humanities & Social Sciences, Hospitality & Travel and Beauty & Fitness. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Musicology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Very humble and supportive teaching staff Discipline in the university campus and in the classroom

review_content.Placements: Seventy percent of students were placed in the course I am studying. The package is 7.2 LPA to 9.6LPA. JNV, KV, and other government institutions recruited the students who graduated from our university and are settled in very good positions. Some of them are great artists too.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library are all in very good condition. Hostels and classrooms are in very hygienic condition, which is very important. The teaching staff and senior students are also very humble and supportive. Anti-ragging campaigns are very effective in our university.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.P.A. in Music - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with education, and placements are also good.

review_content.Placements: Placements are dependent on students' will and performance. In our course, 70% of the students got good placements as a music teacher, instrument teacher, or player in a band. Our teachers regularly send us to perform somewhere. The highest salary package offered is 2-3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is Rs. 60,000-70,000 per annum in starting. The top role offered in our course was as a vocalist for an album.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is just a franchised college, and the main branch is in Chhattisgarh. There is no such hostel facility, but you can stay in a PG. I live in Delhi with my family, so I didn't opt for any hostel or PG, and I persuade as a day scholar. The quality of education they provide is more than enough at the lowest price.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Fine Arts - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Indira Kala Sangit Vishwavidyalaya.

review_content.Placements: 105 students are in BFA course in IKDV University. The college is the best for placements, and 80% of students got placed. Our seniors are the best, disciplined and friendly.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available with the best speed. The best quality classrooms are available. Our classrooms have fans, chairs, tables, coolers, the best quality light, acrylic colors and a watercolor table. The labs are available. The library has the world's best books and the books of English and all languages. The best hostel is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.P.A. in Music - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: A great college for pursuing arts.

review_content.Placements: The students can work as teachers in any schools or colleges after completing the BPA course. But after PhD, students can be professors in any university, and PhD course is also available in this college. The students who qualify in the NET exam have various options to work anywhere in the world. Few senior students are working in abroad.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a great environment with a beautiful garden. There is a Wi-Fi facility on the campus, and most importantly, there are no distractions like malls and cinema halls around the college. Students will love to study here. We have a gym and yoga classes for students, and there are a basketball and badminton court for sports. Most importantly, the fee is very less.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Fine Arts - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: IKSVV is a best college for fine arts.

review_content.Placements: The placement is low in the field of fine arts we are not getting very good packages. We spend a lot of money to learn, but yet we satisfy with our institution because it's good to be here and learn. It is not like that we get placement immediately but will have a good future. Our seniors are in good position.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good in fact amazing. It's a heritage place and the Raj Mahal of Indira Devi rani. Good sacred boundary wall surrounds the whole campus and there is a very big hall which never needs an AC even. Other than the vintage pride campus we have all the world class and latest technology to explore here, amazing sound lab, great library and great tools for our fine artwork. Press, printmaker etc., are available in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor in Fine Arts - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, placement, management is the worst,. .

review_content.Placements: Zero placement, Student have to do by their own. Number of admission are very low I am regretting my decision for admission here No roles offered in our course No recruiting companies for our course. I don't wanna give even one star, this college is the worst,. .
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is the worst, have no facilities of medical emergency not even a disprine. Always shift classes And disturb students. Even shift class to basement where no facilities of toilets and watercooler. When I was in 3rd year We shift our class 3times.

The students who qualify in the NET exam have various options to work anywhere in the world. Few senior students are working in abroad.
content.Infrastructure: We have a great environment with a beautiful garden. There is a Wi-Fi facility on the campus, and most importantly, there are no distractions like malls and cinema halls around the college. Students will love to study here. We have a gym and yoga classes for students, and there are a basketball and badminton court for sports. Most importantly, the fee is very less.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Fine Arts - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: IKSVV is a best college for fine arts.

content.Placements: The placement is low in the field of fine arts we are not getting very good packages. We spend a lot of money to learn, but yet we satisfy with our institution because it's good to be here and learn. It is not like that we get placement immediately but will have a good future. Our seniors are in good position.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good in fact amazing. It's a heritage place and the Raj Mahal of Indira Devi rani. Good sacred boundary wall surrounds the whole campus and there is a very big hall which never needs an AC even. Other than the vintage pride campus we have all the world class and latest technology to explore here, amazing sound lab, great library and great tools for our fine artwork. Press, printmaker etc., are available in the college.

outlook.description:
Indira Kala Sangit Vishwavidyalaya - IKSVV has been ranked well by the Outlook under the 'Music Universities' category. Through the years, the Outlook rankings for Indira Kala Sangit Vishwavidyalaya - IKSVV indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Music Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. college_info.intro: Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions (AMGOI) popular programmes are MBA and BTech. BTech students are taught Software Development, Algorithms, and Emerging Technologies. MBA students are taught to develop Leadership, Finance, and Strategic Management skills. MBA and BTech students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Microland Ltd., TATA Automotive Components Systems, ELCOM International PVT. LTD., and others. If a student opts for the BTech - Artificial Intelligence (AI) & Data Science, he/she can learn AI, Machine Learning, and Data-Driven decision-making. Overall, AMGOI is one of the best colleges offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions (AMGOI) courses and their respective eligibility and Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions (AMGOI) fees:

As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during the Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions placements 2023 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 3.2 LPA, respectively. A total of 216 recruiters visited the campus for 2023 placements and placed 258 students who registered for the 2023 placements. The participating recruiters presented 258 job offers to the students of the 2023 batch.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions (AMGOI) offers UG and PG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Engineering, Management, and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers four-year full-time BTech courses to students. BTech is available in 8 specialisations such as Computer Science & Engineering, Artificial Intelligence (AI) & Data Science, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, and others. At the PG level, the college offers two-year full-time MTech and MBA courses to students. Below mentioned are some of the Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions (AMGOI) courses and their respective eligibility and :

faqs.answer: A:    No, students who are looking for course admission at the Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions must have valid entrance exam scores. The institute offers BTech, M.Tech and MBA courses at the UG and PG levels. The institute offers more than 10 (including specialisations) courses in two streams, such as Engineering and Management. Admission to all UG and PG courses is national-level entrance-based. The institute admits students based on JEE Main/MHT CET scores for the BTech course. Students who are looking for M.Tech admission must have a valid GATE entrance exam score. Similarly, for the MBA course, students are selected based on the MAH MBA CET exam score.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure, facilities, and faculty members are great but placements should be more.

review_content.Placements: Maximum 70% of students are getting placements in college. The highest package of my college for computer science field for year 2024 was 11 LPA. The average package is 3.2 LPA. My course is computer science and engineering which have many facilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is very well done. The classes are well maintained. Classes are very nice. Each class has projectors and the hostel is there of college which is old but a new hostel, auditorium, and cafeteria are under construction.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities for students.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 50% of students got placed in my course. 12 LPA, 2.8 LPA, and 5 LPA are the highest, lowest, and average packages respectively, offered in my course. Infosys, TCS, IBM, Wipro, etc., are the top companies in my course. 10% of students got internships in my course at Infosys. Developer and helper are the top roles offered in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: On our campus there is the main branch of B.Tech engineering, which is divided into two wings right wing and left and right wings. Also, the books are allowed to take at home for 3 days. Hostel is designed well and comfortable for students. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There are good water facilities. The quality of hostel mess is good and value for money. Medical facilities are provided to the students in emergency cases. Sports, games, and events are conducted every year in college hostel.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College had good placements in 2023.

content.Placements: In our college, 50% to 60% of students got placed in renowned MNCs. In our college, 12 LPA is the highest package, 3.5 LPA is the average package, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. TCS, Wipro, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, Wipro, Capgemini, and Microland are top recruiting companies that visited to our college. In our college, 40% to 45% of students got internships in popular, renowned companies.
content.Infrastructure: College have large campus and also have large infrastructure including large building, college having large and suitable classroom and labs. Strong Wi-Fi facilities are available in the campus area, an air-conditioned seminar hall, separate study area for silent studies. A new hostel for students is under construction. Hostel mess is also good and affordable for students. Our college also has various extracurricular activities, departments as yoga, sports, and other technical activities. College library has knowledgeable books ranging from about 47000 to 48000.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college placement is good in 2023.

content.Placements: In our college, 50% to 55% of students got placed. The highest package is offering near about 12 LPA, the average package is 3 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and Cognizant are top MNCs that visited. 40% to 45% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and Wi-Fi facility is available in the campus area. The hostel mess is very good and affordable for students. The building is large. Classrooms and labs have suitable space. Library is big and has knowledgeable books nearly about 46,000 to 47,000.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure, facilities, and faculty members are great but placements should be more.

content.Placements: Maximum 70% of students are getting placements in college. The highest package of my college for computer science field for year 2024 was 11 LPA. The average package is 3.2 LPA. My course is computer science and engineering which have many facilities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is very well done. The classes are well maintained. Classes are very nice. Each class has projectors and the hostel is there of college which is old but a new hostel, auditorium, and cafeteria are under construction.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities for students.

content.Placements: Nearly 50% of students got placed in my course. 12 LPA, 2.8 LPA, and 5 LPA are the highest, lowest, and average packages respectively, offered in my course. Infosys, TCS, IBM, Wipro, etc., are the top companies in my course. 10% of students got internships in my course at Infosys. Developer and helper are the top roles offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: On our campus there is the main branch of B.Tech engineering, which is divided into two wings right wing and left and right wings. Also, the books are allowed to take at home for 3 days. Hostel is designed well and comfortable for students. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There are good water facilities. The quality of hostel mess is good and value for money. Medical facilities are provided to the students in emergency cases. Sports, games, and events are conducted every year in college hostel.

Hostel facility and food are also well done.

admission_overview.college_name: Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions (AMGOI) Course Admission 2025: Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutionsadmission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers BTech, MTech and MBA courses at the UG and PG level. The selection criteria are completely based on the national-level entrance exam score. To get admitted to AMGI, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process at theAshokrao Mane Group of Institutionsis conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutAshokrao Mane Group of Institutionscourse admission2025.

Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions admission 2025is an entrance-based. The institute offers more than 10 courses in two streams such as Engineering and Management. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. Check out the following table for details aboutAshokrao Mane Group of Institutions' course admissions2025:
Particulars
Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Download Now
AMGOI Brochure

Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions' course admissionfor the Engineering course is entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the institute must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. AMGOI offers 8 UG and 5 PG programs, including B.Tech and MBA as its flagship courses. Engineering programs are affiliated with DBATU, Lonere, while management courses link to Shivaji University, Kolhapur.The institute is recognized for its dedication to quality technical education.AMGOI also holds autonomous status, enhancing academic flexibility and innovation. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forAshokrao Mane Group of Institutions courses:
JEE Main/MHT CET
MAH MBA-CET

Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at the Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, http://www.amgoi.org/admissions/Admission-Enquiry. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute admits students based on JEE Main/MHT CET scores for the BTech course. Students who are looking for MTech admission must have a valid GATE entrance exam score. Similarly, for the MBA course, students are selected based on the MAH MBA CET exam score. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for the final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theAshokrao Mane Group of Institutions feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

placement_data.title: Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions has concluded the placements for the Class of 2023 with 83% placement rate . As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during the Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions placements 2023 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 3.2 LPA, respectively. A total of 216 recruiters visited the Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions campus for 2023 placements and offered 258 job offers to the students of the batch 2023.

The participating recruiters offered 55 jobs in the IT sector and 203 jobs in the Core sector to the students of the batch 2023. The top recruiters of Ashokrao Mane Group of Institutions include TCS, Infosys, Accenture, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, Atos, Syntel, Wipro, Lupin, Nvidia, L&T, Capgemini, etc.

reviews.review_heading: College had good placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: College have large campus and also have large infrastructure including large building, college having large and suitable classroom and labs. Strong Wi-Fi facilities are available in the campus area, an air-conditioned seminar hall, separate study area for silent studies. A new hostel for students is under construction. Hostel mess is also good and affordable for students. Our college also has various extracurricular activities, departments as yoga, sports, and other technical activities. College...

reviews.review_heading: The college placement is good in 2023.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and Wi-Fi facility is available in the campus area. The hostel mess is very good and affordable for students. The building is large. Classrooms and labs have suitable space. Library is big and has knowledgeable books nearly about 46,000 to 47,000.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure, facilities, and faculty members are great but placements should be more.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is very well done. The classes are well maintained. Classes are very nice. Each class has projectors and the hostel is there of college which is old but a new hostel, auditorium, and cafeteria are under construction.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities for students.
reviews.review_text: On our campus there is the main branch of B.Tech engineering, which is divided into two wings right wing and left and right wings. Also, the books are allowed to take at home for 3 days. Hostel is designed well and comfortable for students. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There are good water facilities. The quality of hostel mess is good and value for money. Medical facilities are provided to the students in emergency cases. Sports, games, and events are conducted every year in c...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2023 and also top recruiters visit our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good and the environment is nice. The buildings of our college are large and every course has specific suitable department. Library is large and has all knows books about 47,000. Wi-Fi facilities are available in college area and campus area. Labs are very large and maintenance is good. Classrooms are large. Hostel facility and food are also well done.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good as compared to other colleges in our area.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and library. Our college has best campus for students. Our college has a big seminar hall. I came to college by college bus. This college has medium canteen food but has good sports games. I heard that hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very good. It has good packages and placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good library. The Wi-Fi facility is also good. Labs are also very big and good. Each department has washrooms, pure RO water, and labs. There are good classes. The hostel is good, and cleaning is done from time to time. The mess is also good. Different types of food are served every day and of good quality. Sports in our college are very good. Students here have gone to university level and won prizes.

reviews.review_heading: Fabulous infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college is spacious, beautifully landscaped with greenery, and equipped with modern facilities. All classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and with the latest teaching aids like computer system with net connection along with projectors. All the laboratories are equipped with state of art equipment. College is having library facility, reading room facility and central computing facility for all the students. There is facility of common girls as well as boys room.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: Very good facilities and infrastructure are available for our course. AC classrooms are available and very much comfortable benches are also there. Wi-Fi facilities are also there in our department as well as the whole campus. Computer facilities are also there. Library also has excellent stock regarding our curriculum. Lots of books are also available which are necessary for our course.

reviews.review_heading: AMGOI is nurturing talents and building the future.
reviews.review_text: Well-developed infrastructure, labs, SMART classrooms, library, decent hostel facility, clean water, 24 x 7 security, mess and canteen, basic medical center, and sports facilities are available. Gymnasium, indoor stadium, outdoor stadium, annual sports week, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: My course is Computer Science and Engineering, which has many facilities. The infrastructure of the college is very well done. The classrooms are well-maintained and are very nice, and each classroom has a projector. The hostel is part of the college, which is old, but a new hostel, auditorium, and cafeteria are under construction.

reviews.review_heading: It is the excellent college in the state.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is fabulous. The library is full of books like subject related as well as with books for entertainment. Computer labs are equipped with an internet connection. The canteen and all campus are neat and clean. Hostel facility is great.

reviews.review_heading: I feel like I am complete.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the said college is excellent. Wi-Fi and lab are there will have the highest connectivity. Classrooms are clean and neat. Library access is fantastic. Library consists number of books on the subject taught as well as other books for entertainment. I visit it all the time and we also have a study room there.

reviews.review_heading: Really good absolutely.
reviews.review_text: Library and classrooms are good. But computers are in bad condition. College has no hostel. Sports and games will play very well. Mess and canteen are not there in the college. Medical facilities are there. Classrooms are very good but screen teaching is not in a college.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is average well and good. Wi-Fi is available in the college. Classrooms are good, neat, and clean. Library is also good and there are different types of books in library. There is a place for studying also. Hostel is not that good. Sports are also played here.
